name: spore-example-10-hill-climbing
description: spore-core TypeScript example 10: wire the HillClimbing loop strategy. The agent refines one README in place; a custom MetricEvaluator scores each draft with a separate judge model, and the harness keeps improvements / reverts regressions until it stops improving (stagnation) or runs out of budget. There is no PASS — only best-so-far.
